ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (Male, Female) */,
  "cp" TEXT /* Type of chest pain (typical angina, atypical angina, non-anginal, asymptomatic) */,
  "trestbps" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure (in mm Hg) */,
  "chol" INTEGER /* Serum cholesterol level (in mg/dl) */,
  "fbs" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar > 120 mg/dl (True, False) */,
  "restecg" TEXT /* Resting electrocardiographic results (normal, lv hypertrophy, others) */,
  "thalch" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exang" INTEGER /* Exercise-induced angina (True, False) */,
  "oldpeak" REAL /* ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest */,
  "slope" TEXT /* The slope of the peak exercise ST segment */,
  "ca" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels (0-3) colored by fluoroscopy */,
  "thal" TEXT /* Thalassemia (normal, fixed defect, reversable defect) */,
  "num" INTEGER /* Diagnosis of heart disease (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "flag_doente" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the patient is a patient (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (e.g., smoker, non-smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status (e.g., occasional, heavy) */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition or diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment prescribed */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if follow-up is required */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of related medical conditions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of diagnostic test (e.g., ECG, cholesterol test) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "test_result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the test */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_records" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., medication, surgery) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* Doctor who prescribed the treatment */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of follow-up appointment */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the treatment */,
  "treatment_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up appointment */,
  "doctor" TEXT /* Doctor who conducted the follow-up */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes and observations from the follow-up */,
  "next_appointment" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up appointment */,
  "follow_up_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the follow-up */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow-up record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow-up record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Risk factors identified */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for reducing risk */,
  "risk_assessment_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the risk assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk assessment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk assessment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_data" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient (de-identified) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (Male, Female) */,
  "cp" TEXT /* Type of chest pain (typical angina, atypical angina, non-anginal, asymptomatic) */,
  "trestbps" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure (in mm Hg) */,
  "chol" INTEGER /* Serum cholesterol level (in mg/dl) */,
  "fbs" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar > 120 mg/dl (True, False) */,
  "restecg" TEXT /* Resting electrocardiographic results (normal, lv hypertrophy, others) */,
  "thalch" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exang" INTEGER /* Exercise-induced angina (True, False) */,
  "oldpeak" REAL /* ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest */,
  "slope" TEXT /* The slope of the peak exercise ST segment */,
  "ca" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels (0-3) colored by fluoroscopy */,
  "thal" TEXT /* Thalassemia (normal, fixed defect, reversable defect) */,
  "num" INTEGER /* Diagnosis of heart disease (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "flag_doente" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the patient is a patient (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "de_identified_dob" TEXT /* De-identified date of birth */,
  "de_identified_height" REAL /* De-identified height */,
  "de_identified_weight" REAL /* De-identified weight */,
  "de_identified_blood_type" TEXT /* De-identified blood type */,
  "de_identified_smoking_status" TEXT /* De-identified smoking status */,
  "de_identified_alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* De-identified alcohol consumption status */,
  "de_identified_allergies" TEXT /* De-identified allergies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient record accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., consultation, follow-up) */,
  "visit_location" TEXT /* Location of the visit */,
  "doctor" TEXT /* Doctor who conducted the visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes and observations from the visit */,
  "visit_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient note */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., diagnosis, treatment, follow-up) */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "note_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_notes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
